Story Map

Unaware

  • Continues existing manual workflow
  • Unaware of automation possibilities

Aware

  • Searches for {product} online
  • Asks peers for tool recommendations
  • Joins relevant communities

Research

  • Reads review sites
  • Watches demo videos
  • Creates comparison spreadsheet

Consideration

  • Signs up for trial
  • Generates first output
  • Compares side-by-side with manual work

Decision

  • Drafts business case
  • Quantifies ROI
  • Presents recommendation to leadership

Purchase

  • Submits purchase request
  • Fills security questionnaire
  • Coordinates legal review

Onboarding

  • Configures workspace from template
  • Uploads first research files
  • Runs first generation

Adoption

  • Runs weekly auto-generation
  • Uses {product} for draft outputs
  • Configures monitoring for automated updates
